_instructions: This file is populated by /brand-sync when the user provides a branding kit. Do not manually edit.

logo.note: Real designer logo extracted from original file. Logo green is #0A9747, NOT brand green #1AB87A. Inline SVGs use viewBox=1700 2020 3300 980. The o is a compound path (outer + inner in same path element) - do NOT separate them.

usage.navDark: Inline SVG from visto-logo-dark.svg (dark text on light bg)
usage.footerWhite: Inline SVG from visto-logo-white.svg (white text on dark bg)

logo.instances: 55 logo instances across 32 files (nav dark + footer white variants)
